tasks.title: Build Pre-FOMC Drift strategy (event-driven gap)

tasks.title: Build IBS Mean Reversion M2K (Russell daily MR)
tasks.description: IBS = (Close-Low)/(High-Low). Buy when IBS < 0.20. 78% documented win rate. M2K-specific. Daily timeframe overlay.
tasks.next_action: Build and test on M2K daily data

tasks.title: Build NR7 Breakout (vol contraction)
tasks.description: Narrowest 5m bar in last 7 → bracket order. Classic Crabel signal. M2K/MNQ targets.

tasks.description: 76% of RTY gaps fill during RTH. Fade toward fill level. 1 trade/day max.
